_meta.accuracy_note: Every image was inspected before assignment. No guessing.

double.description: Double room with balcony. Terracotta floors, private balcony with morning sun, quiet street-facing side.

twin.description: Twin room with two single beds. Garden or quiet side view. Desk, TV, terracotta floors.

single.description: Single room with balcony. Compact, wooden headboard, single bed, balcony.

standard.description: Standard double room — no dedicated photograph available. Uses double room imagery as representative.

all_rooms.description: Narrow bathroom with vessel sink, toilet, glass shower enclosure, wood-look floor tiles.
Spacious bathroom with vessel sink on wooden stand, toilet, bidet, glass shower, folded white towels.
Compact bathroom with vessel sink, toilet, glass shower enclosure, wall mirror.

bathrooms.note: All rooms have private bathrooms. These three images represent the bathroom style across room categories.

exterior.description: Hotel Mistral exterior at dusk. Three-storey building with balconies, palm trees, illuminated signage.

bar.description: Hotel bar interior. Counter with ribbed wood front, pendant lights, bottle shelves, coffee machine.

billiard.description: Billiard room with green pool table, armchairs, wall-mounted TV.

terrace.description: Outdoor terrace with wicker seating, parasol, terracotta tiles, Hotel Mistral sign visible.

reception.description: Reception desk with ribbed wood front, tropical wallpaper panels, potted plants.

dining_room.description: Indoor breakfast veranda with wooden tables, glass walls overlooking garden.

patio.description: Front patio with metal cafe tables and chairs, stone paving, Hotel Mistral entrance.

buffet_images.description: Cold cuts and cheese buffet station. 'Forchette' sign, glass shelving.
Cereal and muesli station. Glass jars with corn flakes and muesli, stacked bowls.
Pastry display. Croissants, bombolotti, chocolate cakes, powdered cakes on tiered stands.
Ring cake (ciambellone), bombolotti alla crema, sliced bread. Handwritten chalk labels.
Wide pastry buffet. Multiple tiers of croissants, chocolate-filled pastries, sliced bread.

breakfast.note: Breakfast is served in the veranda (554112398.jpg) or garden. Buffet images show the food offering.
